MESIC Laser Ablation System

MESIC · Laser Systems

A comprehensive suite of advanced surgical tools including powered and manual endoscopic staplers, titanium mechanical stapling devices, composite and macroporous hernia meshes, energy-based resection systems, and handheld robotic articulation devices for minimally invasive surgery.

MaterialTitanium (Staples, Spikes, and Fixation Alloy)

Full Technical Matrix
Full Technical Matrix

MESIC Laser Ablation System

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
MIRUS Powered Endocutter Units
MEC60-280 (60mm Small), MEC60-340 (60mm Medium), MEC60-440 (60mm Long), MEC45-280 (45mm Small), MEC45-340 (45mm Medium), MEC45-440 (45mm Long)
Powered Endocutter Reloads (Staple Leg Length)
MECRW (2.5mm White), MECRB (3.5mm Blue), MECRGD (3.8mm Gold), MECRG (4.1mm Green), MECRT (4.4mm Black)
Trio Reloads (Stapler Size Inner to Outer)
Vascular Medium (White): 2.0-3.0mm; Medium Thick (Purple): 3.0-4.0mm; Extra Thick (Black): 4.0-5.0mm
MIRUS Linear Cutter (MLC Series)
MLC60 (64mm Staples line, 60mm Cut), MLC80 (84mm Staples line, 80mm Cut), MLC100 (104mm Staples line, 100mm Cut); Rows: 4, Staples: 64/84/104
MIRUS Auto Linear Stapler (MALS Series)
MALS30 (11 staples, 2 rows), MALS45 (15 staples, 2 rows), MALS60 (21 staples, 2 rows), MALS90 (33 staples, 2 rows); Lengths: 3.5mm (Blue) / 4.8mm (Green)
MIRUS Circular Stapler - III Rows (Variants)
MCS-21R3 (Cut 12mm, Head 21mm, 21 staples), MCS-24R3 (Cut 15mm, Head 24mm, 24 staples), MCS-25R3 (Cut 16mm, Head 25mm, 27 staples), MCS-26R3 (Cut 17mm, Head 26mm, 33 staples), MCS-29R3 (Cut 20mm, Head 29mm, 36 staples), MCS-31R3 (Cut 21mm, Head 31mm, 36 staples), MCS-32R3 (Cut 22mm, Head 32mm, 42 staples)
MIRUS Hemorrhoids Stapler (PPH)
MPPH32 (32mm, 2 rows, 32 staples), MPPH34 (34mm, 2 rows, 32 staples), MPPH34R3 (34mm, 3 rows, 48 staples), MPPH36R3 (36mm, 3 rows, 48 staples); Closed staple height: 0.75-1.6mm
MERINEUM Mesh Technical Matrix
Pore Size: 1.8-2 mm; Pre-Absorption Weight: 185 gsm; Post-Absorption Weight: 40 gsm; Thickness: 0.5-0.6 mm; Initial Burst Strength: 350 N
MERIGROW Mesh Technical Matrix
Material: Polypropylene; Pore size: 1.5-2.3 mm; Weight: 55 gsm; Burst strength: 98.06 N/cm2; Thickness: 0.60 mm
MESIC Laser Ablation Technical Data
Laser Type: GaAiAs Diode; Wavelength: 1470nm; Max Power: 12W; Pulse Duration: 10us - 3s; Repetition: 1 Hz-20KHz; Weight: 2.1 Kg
PROFOUND Mesh Fixation Spikes
MFD15A/MFD15N (15 spikes), MFD30A/MFD30N (30 spikes); Tube diameter: 5 mm; Length: 36 cm

Primary Material

Titanium (Staples, Spikes, and Fixation Alloy)

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Versatile portable diode laser system for vaporisation, coagulation and ablation procedures in Proctology, EVLT, Cosmetic Gynecology and Lipolysis. Features Android interface and built-in battery for enhanced portability.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the MESIC Laser Ablation System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The MESIC Laser Ablation System is constructed using Titanium (Staples, Spikes, and Fixation Alloy), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
